title: Winter Song
content:
They were parted then at last?
        Was it duty, or force, or fate?
        Or did a worldly blast
        Blow-to the meeting-gate?

        An old, short story is this!
        A glance, a trembling, a sigh,
        A gaze in the eyes, a kiss--
        Why will it not go by!
meaning:
This evocative piece by George MacDonald, titled "Winter Song", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
